utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 categories. Now verify full specification per item: 1) destination: provided as 'Prague, Czech Republic' — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: 'June 5-9, 2024' — specific dates provided; it is 5 days inclusive; acceptable. 3) transportation: has 'flights' with total_cost €480 and details 'Budget Airlines Economy, Family of 4' — includes cost, but lacks specific flight numbers/times; the format only requires 'flight details with costs' not necessarily exhaustive specifics; minimal details present, so acceptable. 4) accommodation: hotel 'Eco Lodge', total_cost €450, details 'Family rooms, includes breakfast' — hotel selected with cost; acceptable. 5) activities: three activities each with costs and descriptions — meets 'selected activities with costs'. 6) additional_services: travel_insurance with cost and coverage — meets requirement. 7) total_budget: total_cost, budget_limit, remaining_budget — provides a breakdown; acceptable. All 7 items are present and sufficiently specified according to the stated format.
